description: Designed 'FOR THE RECORD' card from ICE on a deep navy-blue textured (woodgrain) background. Top-left shows the white circular U.S. Department of Homeland Security seal next to white serif text 'U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement', with a thin dark-red horizontal divider rule beneath. Centered below in very large bold white serif capitals is the headline 'FOR THE RECORD'. Beneath it, in white serif with the opening phrase bolded, is the statement: 'Targeted enforcement operations are planned arrests of known criminal aliens who threaten national security or public safety.'
notable_text: FOR THE RECORD; 'Targeted enforcement operations are planned arrests of known criminal aliens who threaten national security or public safety.'
